channel.title: 2026-02-27 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-02-27 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: 用于加速量子材料发现的通用自旋轨道耦合哈密顿模型
item.description:
📚 Nature Machine Intelligence
👤 Yang Zhong, Rui Wang, Xingao Gong, Hongjun Xiang
《自然机器智能》，在线发布：2026 年 2 月 27 日； doi:10.1038/s42256-026-01196-x 钟等人介绍 Uni-HamGNN，这是一种图神经网络模型，可以快速准确地预测自旋轨道耦合电子结构，从而能够快速筛选和发现整个元素周期表中的先进量子材料。

item.title: Quantum Error Correction beyond SU(2): Spin, Bosonic, and Permutation-Invariant Codes from Convex Geometry
item.description:
📚 PRX Quantum
👤 Arda Aydin, Victor V. Albert, and Alexander Barg
Author(s): Arda Aydin, Victor V. Albert, and Alexander Barg Improved error-correcting codes and logical gates with promising characteristics are constructed and proven to be interconvertible among three relevant state spaces. [PRX Quantum 7, 010341] Published Fri Feb 27, 2026

item.title: Thermalization in Open Many-Body Systems and KMS Detailed Balance
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. X
👤 Matteo Scandi and Álvaro M. Alhambra
Author(s): Matteo Scandi and Álvaro M. Alhambra A new many-body thermalization model is derived using KMS detailed balance that avoids the rotating wave approximation, enabling more accurate tracking of quantum dynamics and efficient simulation on quantum computers. [Phys. Rev. X 16, 011040] Published Fri Feb 27, 2026
